steps.title: Set up using elimination or substitution
steps.content: We're given a 2×2 linear system whose solution is $(x, y)$. Solve by elimination — combine the two equations to cancel $x$ and isolate $y$.

steps.title: Solve for $y$
steps.content:
After eliminating $x$, the resulting equation gives $y = -3$.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
